payload.content: Retain every proper noun from the retrieved passages verbatim in the summary. Never paraphrase a name, abbreviate a title, or substitute a pronoun for a named entity.

rationale: Probes whether preserving proper-noun tokens in the hop-1 summary improves hop-2 retrieval (which depends on those tokens being available as query anchors). Cross-task hypothesis: paraphrased summaries lose retrievability.
